text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory suffers an injury, so I rush her to
the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh man... Really? I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's looking pretty down. I wonder what I can
say to comfort her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This is such a horrible turn of events!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Injuries are such a huge setback! But I can't give
up! Even if I fall, I've gotta get back up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trials exist to be overcome! I'm sure I'll recover
quickly if I just get right back to training!
choice_data_list: You know we can't do that.
You know we can't do that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trials exist to be overcome! I'm sure I'll recover
quickly if I just get right back to training!
choice_data_list: You know we can't do that.
You know we can't do that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Even after everything I just said?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My dad told me he never missed a practice
because of injuries when he was younger!
choice_data_list:
If he ever hurt himself this bad, he would have
rested.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Grrr... I'm in trouble, then...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I'll sit tight in my room as a kind of
mental training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's what I'm talking about! Let's make
me the strongest there is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we start warming up with our sights set on
a quick recovery.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Urk!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no. It hurts worse than before...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But that just makes me all the more determined!
Let's try a different warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's spirit might be willing, but her
body can't keep up. In the end, we decide to have
her rest.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd say this is the perfect amount of pain to
give training a bit of a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As long as you believe in me, nothing is
impossible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's strong sense of determination
leads her to a smooth recovery.
